steps.t: Thranduil can be found in Felegoth. You should talk to Thranduil about the attack on the Elves at the caravan.
You should collect sap from trees in Eryn Lasgalen that the Elves have already tapped for sap collection.
The last place anyone saw spiders was near the caravan that was attacked. You should use the sap to lay a trap for the spiders.
Thranduil can be found in Felegoth. You should speak with Thranduil about the failed trap.
A good place for a trap might be closer to Felegoth, near the main road that runs through Eryn Lasgalen. You should use the corrupted sap to lay a tra…
Thranduil can be found in Felegoth. You should bring the spider leg to Thranduil.
